tracks.rawText: 11:15Eminem ft Rihanna - All I Want Is You ( 2026 Music Video ) Out Now [OejSs-oNOFo]UploadContemporary R&B and Hip-Hop fusion featuring a blend of soulful female vocals and rhythmic male rap verses, The track opens with a processed vocal sample and a clean, arpeggiated electric guitar, A sub-bass provides the low-end weight, while the drum kit consists of a crisp snare, tight hi-hats, and a punchy kick drum, The arrangement alternates between melodic, sung choruses with layered harmonies and double-tracked rap verses, A grand piano enters during the bridge, adding a classical texture, The tempo is 92 BPM in the key of G# minor, The production features heavy reverb on the female vocals and a dry, upfront mix for the rap sections, Synthesizer pads provide harmonic filling during the choruses9PublishRemix
tracks.title: Eminem ft Rihanna - All I Want Is You ( 2026 Music Video ) Out Now [OejSs-oNOFo]

tracks.rawText: 3:04Free HishamançUploadSynthwave with a strong 1980s cinematic influence, The track features a prominent analog-style synthesizer playing a driving, syncopated bassline in eighth notes, A gated reverb snare and a punchy kick drum establish a steady mid-tempo groove, Layered polyphonic synthesizers provide bright, staccato chord stabs and shimmering arpeggios, A lead synth with a slight portamento and chorus effect plays a melodic hook, The arrangement utilizes filter sweeps and white noise risers for transitions, The production is characterized by a wide stereo field and a clean, compressed mix typical of modern retrowave, Key of A minor, 105 BPM2PublishRemix
tracks.title: Free Hishamanç
